briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX PIO peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx1 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX TMR peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx1 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX Timing Detector (TIMDET) peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx1 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX DDC peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx1 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX AUX peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx1 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX AUD peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx1 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX Link Status (LNKSTA) peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx1 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX driver.

detaileddescription.para: This handler reads the pending interrupt from PIO, DDC, TIMDET, AUX, AUD and LNKSTA peripherals, determines the source of the interrupts, clears the interrupts and calls callbacks accordingly.

The application is responsible for connecting this function to the interrupt system. Application beyond this driver is also responsible for providing callbacks to handle interrupts and installing the callbacks using XV_HdmiRx1_SetCallback() during initialization phase. An example delivered with this driver demonstrates how this could be done.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx1 instance that just interrupted.

briefdescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType:

para.preformatted: HandlerType Callback Function Type ------------------------- ----------------------------------------------- (XV_HDMIRX1_HANDLER_VTD) VtdCallback (XV_HDMIRX1_HANDLER_AUX) AuxCallback (XV_HDMIRX1_HANDLER_AUD) AudCallback (XV_HDMIRX1_HANDLER_LNKSTA) LnkStaCallback (XV_HDMIRX1_HANDLER_PIO) PioCallback

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMI RX core instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This file contains interrupt related functions for Xilinx HDMI RX core.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xv_hdmirx1.h for more details of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 EB 02/05/19 Initial release.
